description: Schema for extracting key information from an invoice document.

invoice_number.description: The unique identifier for the invoice.

issue_date.description: The date when the invoice was issued. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

due_date.description: The date when the invoice payment is due. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

vendor_name.description: The name of the vendor or service provider.

vendor_address.description: The full address of the vendor.

vendor_email.description: The email address of the vendor.

customer_name.description: The name of the customer or entity being billed.

customer_address.description: The full billing address of the customer.

line_items.description: A list of individual items or services detailed in the invoice.

description.description: A description of the item or service.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item or service.

unit_price.description: The price per unit of the item or service.

amount.description: The total amount for this line item (quantity * unit_price).

subtotal.description: The sum of all line item amounts before taxes and discounts.

tax_rate.description: The tax rate applied to the invoice, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.08875 for 8.875%).

tax_amount.description: The total amount of tax applied to the invoice.

total_amount.description: The grand total amount of the invoice, including taxes and other charges.

payment_terms.description: The specified payment terms for the invoice (e.g., 'Net 30').
